Alibaba Cloud.label: Alibaba June Quarter 2025 results
Alibaba Cloud.evidence: Alibaba June quarter 2025 results report Cloud Intelligence Group revenue of RMB33,398 million, up 26% year-over-year, and adjusted EBITA of RMB2,954 million, up 26% year-over-year.

Alibaba Cloud.label: Alibaba September Quarter 2025 results
Alibaba Cloud.evidence: Alibaba September quarter 2025 results report Cloud Intelligence Group revenue of RMB39,824 million, up 34% year-over-year, and adjusted EBITA of RMB3,604 million, up 35% year-over-year.

Alibaba Cloud.label: Alibaba December Quarter 2025 results
Alibaba Cloud.evidence: Alibaba December quarter 2025 results report Cloud Intelligence Group revenue of RMB43,284 million, up 36% year-over-year, and adjusted EBITA of RMB3,911 million, up 25% year-over-year.

Alibaba Cloud.label: Alibaba March Quarter 2026 and Fiscal Year 2026 results
Alibaba Cloud.evidence: Alibaba March quarter 2026 results report Cloud Intelligence Group revenue of RMB41,626 million, up 38% year-over-year, and adjusted EBITA of RMB3,796 million, up 57% year-over-year.

Huawei Cloud / Cloud Computing.label: Huawei 2025 Annual Report quick view
Huawei Cloud / Cloud Computing.evidence: Huawei 2025 Annual Report By Business Segment table reports Cloud Computing revenue of CNY32,161 million for 2025, CNY33,325 million for 2024, and YoY (3.5)%; the note states revenue derived from cloud computing business, including revenue from other Huawei segments, amounted to CNY72,075 million.

Huawei Cloud / Cloud Computing.evidence: Huawei annual reports index lists the 2025 Annual Report quick view and PDF, plus past annual reports; no quarterly or interim cloud segment financial report entry is provided on this official annual reports page.

Oracle Cloud.evidence: Oracle FY2025 Q4 release reports Cloud Revenue 6.7 billion USD up 27%, Cloud Infrastructure revenue 3.0 billion USD up 52%, and Cloud Application revenue 3.7 billion USD up 12%.

Oracle Cloud.evidence: Oracle FY2026 Q1 release reports Cloud Revenue 7.2 billion USD up 28%, Cloud Infrastructure revenue 3.3 billion USD up 55%, and Cloud Application revenue 3.8 billion USD up 11%.

Oracle Cloud.evidence: Oracle FY2026 Q2 release reports Cloud Revenue 8.0 billion USD up 34%, Cloud Infrastructure revenue 4.1 billion USD up 68%, and Cloud Application revenue 3.9 billion USD up 11%.

Oracle Cloud.label: Oracle FY2026 Q3 earnings release
Oracle Cloud.evidence: Oracle FY2026 Q3 release reports Cloud Revenue 8.9 billion USD up 44%, Cloud Infrastructure revenue 4.9 billion USD up 84%, and Cloud Application revenue 4.0 billion USD up 13%.

Oracle Cloud.evidence: Oracle FY2026 Q4 release reports Total Cloud Revenues 9.9 billion USD up 47%, Cloud Infrastructure revenue 5.8 billion USD up 93%, and Cloud Applications revenue 4.1 billion USD up 10%.

SmarTone: 结构化数值来自 StockAnalysis 在线季度/半年度标准化表；关键结论需用官方季报、业绩公告或年报逐项复核。
HKBN: 结构化数值来自 StockAnalysis 在线季度/半年度标准化表；关键结论需用官方季报、业绩公告或年报逐项复核。
HGC: 非上市主体，未发现稳定公开季度/半年度完整财务表；本包只记录来源缺口，不估算。
无可自动抓取的公开标准化季度/半年度表；不得估算。
已核验 HGC 官网公司简介和主页；仅确认公司身份、业务范围和披露缺口，不写入任何估算财务数。
i-CABLE: 结构化数值来自 StockAnalysis 在线季度/半年度标准化表；关键结论需用官方季报、业绩公告或年报逐项复核。
AWS: AWS 使用 Amazon 官方 earnings release 和 2025 Form 10-K 的 Segment Information 表；数值为 AWS segment net sales 和 operating income，不使用 Amazon 母公司总收入替代。
2025 Q1-Q3 直接来自官方季度 earnings release；Q4 由 2025 Form 10-K AWS 全年分部数减 Q1-Q3 官方季度数复算，并在 verification_method 中标明为 official_annual_minus_q1_q3_segment_reconciliation。
Microsoft Azure / Intelligent Cloud: Azure 未单独披露收入；需使用 Intelligent Cloud/Server products and cloud services 代理口径。
Microsoft 不披露 Azure 绝对收入；本包写入官方 Intelligent Cloud 分部 revenue / operating income 作为代理口径，并单列 Azure and other cloud services 收入同比增速。
期间按自然季度标注：Q1 2025 对应 Microsoft FY25 Q3，Q2 2025 对应 FY25 Q4，Q3 2025 对应 FY26 Q1。
Google Cloud: Google Cloud 收入和经营利润使用 Alphabet 官方 SEC 10-Q/8-K 季度分部表，并与 SEC 2025 Form 10-K 的 Google Cloud 全年收入 58,705 百万美元、经营利润 13,910 百万美元精确勾稽。
Google Cloud revenue_growth_yoy 来自官方季度 10-Q/8-K 管理层讨论或业绩公告；不使用媒体摘要作为逐行核验来源。
Alibaba Cloud: Alibaba Cloud 使用 Alibaba 官方 Cloud Intelligence Group 分部口径；FY2026 Q4 对应截至 2026-03-31 的 March Quarter 2026。
本轮先写入官方最新季度的 revenue、revenue_growth_yoy、adjusted_ebita 和 adjusted_ebita_growth_yoy；更早季度仍需继续从官方 PDF 或年报逐项抽取。
Tencent Cloud / Tencent FBS proxy: 腾讯云未单独披露收入；只能使用 FinTech and Business Services 代理口径并明确说明。
Tencent 不披露纯 Tencent Cloud 收入；本包使用官方 FinTech and Business Services 分部作为代理口径，需明确包含金融科技、企业服务、云/AI相关服务和电商技术服务等。
Q1 2025 行来自 Tencent 2Q2025 earnings release 的比较表；Q2-Q4 2025 来自对应官方 earnings release 的当季披露。
Q4 2025 同比增速由官方表中 4Q2025 RMB60,818 million 与 4Q2024 RMB56,125 million 复算约 8.36%，按披露口径记录为 8%。
Huawei Cloud / Cloud Computing: 非上市公司；季度云分部收入需从官方季报/半年报/年报手工抽取，不能用估算值。
Huawei 为非上市公司，官方公开披露以年度报告为主；本包只记录季度披露缺口和年度云分部证据，不写入估算季度数据。
Oracle Cloud: Oracle 可披露 Cloud services 产品线收入，但分部利润为 Cloud and license 口径。
Oracle 披露 Cloud Revenue、Cloud Infrastructure (IaaS) Revenue 和 Cloud Application (SaaS) Revenue；本包不把 Oracle 总收入或 Software revenue 当作云收入。
Oracle 未披露纯云业务利润；本次只写入官方季度云收入拆分和同比增速。
